objective: Restore deterministic builds by aligning all dependency versions across package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml while ensuring modern compatible versions.
principles: Apply first-principles debugging to identify the dependency mismatch.
Prefer deterministic builds using exact versions.
Ensure dependency ecosystem compatibility (Tailwind, Vite, plugins).
Minimize changes while restoring CI stability.
analysis_requirements: Identify version mismatches or newly added packages missing from lockfile.
Check compatibility between Tailwind, Vite, and @tailwindcss/vite plugin versions.

execution_plan.details: Convert all dependencies to explicit exact versions (no ^ or ~).
Ensure Tailwind, Vite, and related plugins are on compatible major versions.

commands: git commit -m "fix(deps): align dependency versions and regenerate lockfile"

render_build_command: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 && pnpm run build
verification: pnpm install succeeds without lockfile errors
one_sentence_justification: Aligning exact dependency versions and regenerating the lockfile removes the deterministic build mismatch that causes pnpm to fail in CI environments.
